title: Hacksaw Ridge
tmdbOverview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.
synopsis: Hacksaw Ridge is a 2016 drama, history and war film from United States and United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
